steps.title: Compare the island counts
steps.content: The notes show that different definitions produce dramatically different counts for Sweden: 221,000 islands under one definition and 24 under another.

steps.title: Reject limited statements
steps.content:
• Choice A: It presents only one definition and does not generalize about differing definitions.
  • Choice B: It mentions different definitions but not the size of their effect.
  • Choice C: It focuses on Sweden's islands, not nissologists' definitions.

steps.title: Generalize from Sweden
steps.content: The best sentence both generalizes that definitions can create huge disparities and supports that point with Sweden's numbers. The answer is D.
